name: 高府到沈府
description: 街道两侧贴满红色喜字，店铺挂红灯笼。花轿队伍行进在青石板路上，轿身朱红描金，轿顶插花。随行有吹鼓手、提灯笼的仆从。沿途围观百姓，孩童追逐。从高府到沈府，街景从官宦区过渡到更显赫的府邸区，建筑愈发气派。天色明亮，喜庆气氛浓厚。
visual_reference: Ming Dynasty wedding procession street, red double happiness characters on walls, red lanterns hanging from shops, ornate red and gold sedan chair with flowers on top, musicians and lantern-bearing servants, onlookers and children along blue stone street, transition from official residence area to grander mansion district, bright daylight, festive celebratory atmosphere, traditional Chinese wedding parade
lighting: 明亮日光，红灯笼和喜字反射暖色调
emotional_range: 表面喜庆下的内心冷漠与心不在焉
